bug.description: integer truncation when assigning a wider type to a narrower type

prompt:
There is a integer truncation when assigning a wider type to a narrower type downstream of function oai_nfapi_rach_ind in the nfapi/oai_integration subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/oai_integration/nfapi_pnf.c:2343.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
